## Summary

_Describe the purpose of this PR in 1-3 sentences._

## Type of Change

_Mark with `x` as appropriate. All items will receive automated checks via CI._

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] Test addition/update

## Testing

_Describe how the changes were tested. Note that 100% code coverage is enforced by the pre-commit hook._

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] 100% code coverage maintained
- [ ] All tests pass (`npm test`)

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes (oxlint + oxfmt)
- [ ] TypeScript definitions updated (`npm run types`) if applicable
- [ ] All JSDoc docblocks present and up to date
- [ ] No `console.log` statements in production code
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets
